untranslatable_reason: Signal requires microstructure-level order book data (best bid/offer, order queue position, time precedence, volume fills) and real-time quote confirmation which are not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The core mechanism involves order placement priority and queue position, not price action patterns. Indicators like 'current best bid', 'price improvement opportunity', 'quote confirmed at improved level', and 'target notional volume matched' cannot be expressed with OHLCV-based technical indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally an order book microstructure play requiring HFT/market-making infrastructure, not a technical analysis pattern suitable for backtesting with candlestick data. The entry conditions (improving the bid/offer by 1-2 ticks and achieving time priority) and exit conditions (5-second hold, 50% volume fill, 3-tick adverse move) require order-level execution data unavailable in standard indicator libraries.
